attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
 1 as BATCH_ID,
OBJECT_ID as OBJECT_ID,
OPTY_ID as OPTY_ID,
OPTY_NUMBER as OPTY_NUMBER,
OPTY_NAME as OPTY_NAME,
CAST( LEFT(OREPLACE(CREATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as CREATED_ON,
CREATED_BY as CREATED_BY,
CAST( LEFT(OREPLACE(UPDATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as UPDATED_ON,
UPDATED_BY as UPDATED_BY,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,
--cast(CAST(substr(APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,1,instr(APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,'.',1)-1) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as TIMESTAMP(0) format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as APPROVAL_REQUIRED_BY_DATE,
-- CAST(DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE,
---DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE as DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE,
cast(DEAL_EXPECTED_BOOK_DATE as timestamp(0) FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
case REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG when 'T' then 'Y' ELSE 'N' end AS REVENUE_RECOG_FLAG,
SERV_SALES_PATH as SERV_SALES_PATH,
VERTICAL_MARKET as VERTICAL_MARKET,
REOPEN_REASON as REOPEN_REASON,
DEAL_DURATION as DEAL_DURATION,
TRIM (DEAL_TYPE) as DEAL_TYPE,
DEAL_TYPE_NAME as DEAL_TYPE_NAME,
DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME as DEAL_CREATOR_ROLE_NAME,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,
--cast(CAST(substr(EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,1,instr(EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,'.',1)-1) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) as TIMESTAMP(0) format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as EXPECTED_CLOSE_DATE,
ACTIVE_WORKFLOW as ACTIVE_WORKFLOW,
MDM_DEAL_STATUS as MDM_DEAL_STATUS,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE,
--CAST(MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') as MDM_DEAL_EXPIRATION_DATE,
SFDC_OPTY_ID as SFDC_OPTY_ID,
SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG as SFDC_ACTIVE_FLAG,
DEAL_OBJECT_ID as DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
DEAL_SCOPE as DEAL_SCOPE,
DEAL_SCOPE_NAME as DEAL_SCOPE_NAME,
CASE SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG when 'True' then 'Y' ELSE 'N' end AS SFDC_INTEGRATION_FLAG,
MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME as MDM_DEAL_STATUS_NAME,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(SUBMIT_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as SUBMIT_DATE,
FINAL_BAND  as  FINAL_BAND,
OWNER_CEC_ID as OWNER_CEC_ID,
OWNER_FORECAST_POSITION as OWNER_FORECAST_POSITION,
REOPEN_REASON_DESC as REOPEN_REASON_DESC,
UPDATED_BY_KAFKA as UPDATED_BY_KAFKA,
cast(left (UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,19) as timestamp(0)) as UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
OFFSET_NUMBER as OFFSET_NUMBER,
CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
PARTITION_NUMBER as PARTITION_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SOURCE_DEAL_OBJECT_ID as SOURCE_DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
IS_OPPTY_DEAL AS IS_OPPTY_DEAL,
DEAL_INTENT AS DEAL_INTENT,
OPPTY_DEAL_ID AS OPPTY_DEAL_ID,
RENEWAL_DEAL_IDS AS RENEWAL_DEAL_IDS,
IS_BASE_DEAL AS IS_BASE_DEAL,
BASE_DEAL_ID AS BASE_DEAL_ID
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL_KAFKA SICQV
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION by OPTY_NUMBER order by EDW_CREATE_DTM desc,OFFSET_NUMBER desc)=1
WHERE 
CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_EL_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL_KAFKA') and 
NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL_RNWL_KAFKA ELCQV
where SICQV.OPTY_NUMBER=ELCQV.OPTY_NUMBER
)
